name: zambahola-one-agent
description: ZAMBAHOLA ONE AGENT v0 — local paper-trading agent

scripts.agent:directional-live: node scripts/run-env.mjs --file config/phase2-live.env -- npm run start -w @zambahola/one-agent
scripts.agent:phase2-live: node scripts/run-env.mjs --file config/phase2-live.env -- npm run start -w @zambahola/one-agent
scripts.agent:phase2-signals: node scripts/run-env.mjs --file config/phase2-signals.env -- npm run start -w @zambahola/one-agent
scripts.agent:phase2-learn-trade: node scripts/run-env.mjs --file config/phase2-learn-trade.env -- npm run start -w @zambahola/one-agent
scripts.agent:phase2-hybrid: node scripts/run-env.mjs --file config/phase2-hybrid.env -- npm run start -w @zambahola/one-agent
scripts.agent:phase3-intensive: node scripts/run-env.mjs --file config/phase3-intensive.env -- npm run start -w @zambahola/one-agent
scripts.agent:phase4-hit-recover: node scripts/run-env.mjs --file config/phase4-hit-recover.env -- npm run start -w @zambahola/one-agent
scripts.agent:phase4-reload: npm run agent:stop && npm run agent:phase4-hit-recover
scripts.agent:phase5-ready: node scripts/run-env.mjs --file config/phase5-ready.env -- npm run start -w @zambahola/one-agent
scripts.agent:phase5-reload: npm run agent:stop && npm run agent:phase5-ready
scripts.agent:experiments: node scripts/run-env.mjs --file config/phase2-live.env ZAMBAHOLA_ACCURACY_FILTER=off -- npm run experiments -w @zambahola/one-agent
scripts.agent:experiments:quick: node scripts/run-env.mjs --file config/phase2-live.env ZAMBAHOLA_ACCURACY_FILTER=off ZAMBAHOLA_EXP_BARS=300 -- npm run experiments -w @zambahola/one-agent -- 01
scripts.agent:omni-train: node scripts/run-env.mjs --file config/omni-train.env -- npm run omni-train -w @zambahola/one-agent
scripts.agent:omni-train:quick: node scripts/run-env.mjs ZAMBAHOLA_OMNI_EPOCHS=1 ZAMBAHOLA_WF_WINDOWS=2 ZAMBAHOLA_OMNI_KLINES=5000 ZAMBAHOLA_ULTRA_CYCLES=8 ZAMBAHOLA_OMNI_SKIP_CURRICULUM=1 -- npm run omni-train -w @zambahola/one-agent
scripts.agent:omni-train:night: node scripts/run-env.mjs --file config/phase5-night-train.env -- npm run omni-train -w @zambahola/one-agent
scripts.agent:start: node scripts/run-env.mjs --file config/max-accuracy.env -- npm run start -w @zambahola/one-agent
scripts.agent:turbo-learn: node scripts/run-env.mjs ZAMBAHOLA_FEED=mock -- npm run learn -w @zambahola/one-agent
